Name: Dread Souleater
Summary: Immune troll caster that spreads healing absorbs across the party.
Description:
[Healer] Necrotic Wave arcs to nearby players, so stagger externals and healing cooldowns to clear the absorbs.
[Dodge] Rain of Toads adds floor clutter during the same pull.
[Priority] Kill this early in most opener packs.

Name: Keen Headhunter
Summary: Ranged hunter trash that snares one target and spikes another from range.
Description:
[Kick] Stop Hooked Snare or free the target with a freedom effect.
[Positioning] Throw Spear has a minimum range, so stacking closer to the mob reduces the threat.
[Routing] Do not let this mob live too long in spread pulls.

Name: Hulking Juggernaut
Summary: Immune brawler with a major bleed tank hit and a cast-stop check.
Description:
[Tank] Use a defensive or bleed cleanse for Rending Gore.
[Cast Stop] Deafening Roar finishes with a stop-casting requirement, so cut your cast early.
[Priority] This is a prime defensive target in the opening area.

Name: Ritual Hexxer
Summary: Support caster with a mandatory interrupt and backup bolt pressure.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt every Hex cast or be ready to magic dispel it.
[Fallback] Spend spare kicks on Shadow Bolt.
[Priority] This mob is especially dangerous when paired with Hex Guardian rot.

Name: Hex Guardian
Summary: Immune ritual brute that constantly pulses group damage while marking players.
Description:
[Healer] Searing Presence is always on, so plan cooldowns before the pull starts.
[Dodge] Magma Surge is a line attack; do not clip the group.
[Dispel] Remove Ritual Firebrand when possible and keep the marked players moving out of circles.

Name: Restless Gnarldin
Summary: Immune shadow add that adds melee splash damage to the tank profile.
Description:
[Tank] Spectral Strikes makes its melee swings splash shadow damage, so respect sustained uptime.
[Defensive] Use a defensive for Staggering Blow.
[Dodge] Move out of Ancestral Crush circles and puddles before they box the pull in.

Name: Hollow Soulrender
Summary: Immune bridge caster with tank pressure, soul explosions, and a dispellable root.
Description:
[Kick] Use spare interrupts on Shadowfrost Blast to lower tank damage.
[Awareness] Stay away from Lost Souls during Rend Souls so they do not explode on the party.
[Dispel] Frost Nova can be dispelled or freedomed, but the targeted player should still move away from allies first.
